headline: TransDigm Group Incorporated (TDG): Stephen Mandel Continues Bullish Stance
summary: We just covered Lone Pine’s Non-AI Strategy Falters: 10 Non-AI Stocks Weighing Down Stephen Mandel’s 2026 Returns and TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE:TDG) ranks 7th on this list. TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE:TDG) is a long-term holding in the 13F portfolio of Lone Pine Capital. The fund first disclosed a stake in the company back in the […]
